bsky.name: Jon Cooper
bsky.text:
Kentucky Gov. Andy Beshear has the constitutional authority to temporarily appoint someone to fill Mitch McConnell’s seat. If GOP lawmakers want to challenge that, they can do so.

This will be the first big test to see whether Beshear really is presidential material. I hope he p

bsky.name: WeRateDogs
bsky.text: This is Bruno and Rocket. Rocket insists on making a grand entrance. Bruno is happy to help with that. 13/10 for both (IG: bruno_da_doxie_doggie)
bsky.ko: 얘는 **Bruno**랑 **Rocket**이야. Rocket은 화려하게 등장하겠다고 고집을 부리고, Bruno는 기꺼이 그걸 도와주지. 둘 다 13/10 (IG: bruno_da_doxie_doggie)

bsky.name: Kongou
bsky.text:
Governor Beshear...

Get in your car. Drive to the hospital. Demand to speak to the Senator. No more waffling, no more waiting for them to reply. "I see the Senator now, or I assume he's not coming back and call an election when I leave."
bsky.ko: **베셔어 주지사님**... 차에 타세요. 병원으로 가세요. 그리고 상원의원을 만나게 해달라고 요구하세요. 더 이상 우물쭈물, 답장 기다리기는 그만. "지금 당장 상원의원을 만나겠소. 아니면 그가 돌아오지 못한다고 보고, 나가는 길로 **보궐선거**를 소집하겠소."

bsky.name: Luca
bsky.text:
Bear was never taught this, it's something he's learned all on his own. He knows Honey is deaf and is always looking out for her.

They were all adopted from a shelter after originally being rescued from a puppy farm. 

TT: @kellydinham
bsky.ko: **Bear**는 이걸 배운 적이 없어. 순전히 혼자 스스로 터득한 거야. **Honey가 귀가 안 들린다는 걸** 알고 늘 챙겨준다니까. 얘들은 원래 **강아지 공장**에서 구조된 뒤에 보호소에서 다 같이 입양됐어. TT: @kellydinham

bsky.name: Sean Thomason
bsky.text: The Odyssey is such a hit that apparently the author has already churned out a prequel called “The Iliad”? Typical Hollywood.

bsky.name: Seth Abramson
bsky.text: Hosting a World Cup as President of the United States and having it end with the entire world somehow hating you even more than the historically unprecedented degree to which they already hated you is quite the accomplishment given that he never laced up even once

bsky.name: Holly Hoye 🇨🇦
bsky.text: Please enjoy this lovely tariff-free forest.
bsky.ko: **관세 없는** 이 사랑스러운 숲을 마음껏 즐겨보세요.

bsky.name: tiredsleepy⭐️🍒
bsky.text: i don’t trust anything going down right now (an apology to Taylor Farms? really) so i will be buying produce from our local farmer’s market only + eating canned and frozen veggies for… the entire rest of this administration. it’s time to support local 100% 🌈🦋💗

bsky.name: Abilu Tangwa.
bsky.text: GDP counts pollution as growth. Deforestation as growth. Bottled water after rivers die as growth. It is time to count what actually matters: A planet that can still sustain 8 billion of us.
